pokemon:clefable.name: Clefable
pokemon:clefable.summary: Clefable moves by skipping lightly as if it were flying using its wings. Its bouncy step lets it even walk on water. It is known to take strolls on lakes on quiet, moonlit nights.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Clefable moves by skipping lightly as if it were flying using its wings. Its bouncy step lets it even walk on water. It is known to take strolls on lakes on quiet, moonlit nights.
It is very wary and rarely shows itself to people. Its ears can hear a pin drop over half a mile away.
Their ears are sensitive enough to hear a pin drop from over a mile away, so they’re usually found in quiet places.
A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.
Said to live in quiet, remote mountains, this type of fairy has a strong aversion to being seen.
Rarely seen by people, it is said to be drawn by the full moon to play at deserted lakes.
A CLEFABLE uses its wings to skip lightly as if it were flying. Its bouncy step lets it even walk on water. On quiet, moonlit nights, it strolls on lakes.
It has an acute sense of hearing. It can easily hear a pin being dropped nearly 1,100 yards away.
With its acute hearing, it can pick up sounds from far away. It usually hides in quiet places.
With its acute hearing, it can pick up sounds from far away. It usually hides in quiet places.
A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen, it will run and hide the moment it senses people.
Legend says that on clear, quiet nights, it listens for the voices of its kin living on the moon. I, too, often think of my homeland, so far away.
They appear to be very protective of their own world. It is a kind of fairy, rarely seen by people.
They appear to be very protective of their own world. It is a kind of fairy, rarely seen by people.
According to tradition, people who see a pair of Clefable skipping by can look forward to a happy marriage.
Clefable moves by skipping lightly as if it were flying using its wings. Its bouncy step lets it even walk on water. It is known to take strolls on lakes on quiet, moonlit nights.
Its hearing is so acute it can hear a pin drop over half a mile away. It lives on quiet mountains.
It is very wary and rarely shows itself to people. Its ears can hear a pin drop over half a mile away.
A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.
CLEFABLE moves by skipping lightly as if it were flying using its wings. Its bouncy step lets it even walk on water. It is known to take strolls on lakes on quiet, moonlit nights.
CLEFABLE moves by skipping lightly as if it were flying using its wings. Its bouncy step lets it even walk on water. It is known to take strolls on lakes on quiet, moonlit nights.
Their ears are sensitive enough to hear a pin drop from over a mile away, so they’re usually found in quiet places.
Its very sensitive ears lets it dis­ tinguish distant sounds. As a re­ sult, it prefers quiet places.
Its very sensitive ears let it distinguish distant sounds. As a result, it prefers quiet places.
They don’t like to reveal themselves in front of people. They live quietly in packs deep in the mountains.
A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen, it will run and hide the moment it senses people.
Some scientists believe that it gazes intently at the sky on nights with a full moon because it’s homesick.
It can’t help but hear a pin drop from over half a mile away, so it lives deep in the mountains where there aren’t many people or Pokémon.
It is very wary and rarely shows itself to people. Its ears can hear a pin drop over half a mile away.
Their ears are sensitive enough to hear a pin drop from over a mile away, so they’re usually found in quiet places.
Its hearing is so acute it can hear a pin drop over half a mile away. It lives on quiet mountains.
A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen, it will run and hide the moment it senses people.
They appear to be very protective of their own world. It is a kind of fairy, rarely seen by people.

pokemon:cleffa.name: Cleffa
pokemon:cleffa.summary: On nights with many shooting stars, Cleffa can be seen dancing in a ring. They dance through the night and stop only at the break of day, when these Pokémon quench their thirst with the morning dew.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: On nights with many shooting stars, Cleffa can be seen dancing in a ring. They dance through the night and stop only at the break of day, when these Pokémon quench their thirst with the morning dew.
It is often seen when shooting stars fill the night skies. It’s said to arrive riding on a shooting star.
According to local rumors, Cleffa are often seen in places where shooting stars have fallen.
If the impact site of a meteorite is found, this POKéMON is certain to be within the immediate area.
Its silhouette is like a star. It is believed to arrive riding on shooting stars.
On nights with many shooting stars, CLEFFA can be seen dancing in a ring. They dance until daybreak, when they quench their thirst with the morning dew.
When numerous meteors illuminate the night sky, sightings of CLEFFA strangely increase.
Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.
Because of its unusual, starlike silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.
Because of its unusual, starlike silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.
In silhouette, they resemble twinkling starlight. When shooting stars rain from the night sky, Cleffa gather in numbers and dance as though they are indeed incarnations of the stars.
Because of its silhouette, it’s believed to be a star reborn. For some reason, it loves Minior.
On nights with many shooting stars, Cleffa can be seen dancing in a ring. They dance through the night and stop only at the break of day, when these Pokémon quench their thirst with the morning dew.
Many appear when the night skies are filled with shooting stars. They disappear with sunrise.
It is often seen when shooting stars fill the night skies. It’s said to arrive riding on a shooting star.
On nights with many shooting stars, CLEFFA can be seen dancing in a ring. They dance through the night and stop only at the break of day, when these POKéMON quench their thirst with the morning dew.
On nights with many shooting stars, CLEFFA can be seen dancing in a ring. They dance through the night and stop only at the break of day, when these POKéMON quench their thirst with the morning dew.
Because of its unusual, starlike silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.
When numerous me­ teors illuminate the night sky, sightings of CLEFFA strangely increase.
When numerous meteors illuminate the night sky, sightings of CLEFFA strangely increase.
On late nights illuminated by shooting stars, it gazes intently skyward, as if thinking of its home.
According to local rumors, Cleffa are often seen in places where shooting stars have fallen.
Said to have ridden here on a shooting star, Cleffa seem to appear in places where meteorites have struck in the past.
On nights with many shooting stars, they gather in packs and dance in circles. If you should see them, something good will happen!
It is often seen when shooting stars fill the night skies. It’s said to arrive riding on a shooting star.
According to local rumors, Cleffa are often seen in places where shooting stars have fallen.
Because of its unusual, starlike silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

pokemon:clefairy.name: Clefairy
pokemon:clefairy.summary: On every night of a full moon, groups of this Pokémon come out to play. When dawn arrives, the tired Clefairy return to their quiet mountain retreats and go to sleep nestled up against each other.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: On every night of a full moon, groups of this Pokémon come out to play. When dawn arrives, the tired Clefairy return to their quiet mountain retreats and go to sleep nestled up against each other.
It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.
On nights with a full moon, Clefairy gather from all over and dance. Bathing in moonlight makes them float.
Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.
Though rarely seen, it becomes easier to spot, for some reason, on the night of a full moon.
Thought to live with others on quiet mountains, it is popular for its adorable nature.
On every night of a full moon, they come out to play. When dawn arrives, the tired CLEFAIRY go to sleep nestled up against each other in deep and quiet mountains.
Its adorable appearance makes it popular as a pet. However, it is rare and difficult to find.
The moonlight that it stores in the wings on its back apparently gives it the ability to float in midair.
The moonlight that it stores in the wings on its back apparently gives it the ability to float in midair.
With its magical and cute appeal, it has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.
It can be found in quiet mountain areas on a full moon's night. Its dancing and its tiny, faintly glowing wings confer upon it a lovely fairylike quality.
Adored for their cute looks and playfulness. They are thought to be rare, as they do not appear often.
Adored for their cute looks and playfulness. They are thought to be rare, as they do not appear often.
On nights with a full moon, they gather together and dance. The surrounding area is enveloped in an abnormal magnetic field.
On every night of a full moon, groups of this Pokémon come out to play. When dawn arrives, the tired Clefairy return to their quiet mountain retreats and go to sleep nestled up against each other.
It flies using the wings on its back to collect moonlight. This Pokémon is difficult to find.
It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of CLEFAIRY dancing under a full moon.
Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.
On every night of a full moon, groups of this POKéMON come out to play. When dawn arrives, the tired CLEFAIRY return to their quiet mountain retreats and go to sleep nestled up against each other.
On every night of a full moon, groups of this POKéMON come out to play. When dawn arrives, the tired CLEFAIRY return to their quiet mountain retreats and go to sleep nestled up against each other.
Its adorable behavior and cry make it highly popular. However, this cute Pokémon is rarely found.
Its adorable be­ havior and cry make it highly popular. However, this cute POKéMON is rarely found.
Its adorable behavior and cry make it highly popular. However, this cute Pokémon is rarely found.
Its adorable behavior and appearance make it popular with men and women, young and old. Its numbers are few, however.
It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.
Bathed in moonlight, its wings glow faintly. Without even flapping, Clefairy rises into the air, where it dances around.
They’re popular, but they’re rare. Trainers who show them off recklessly may be targeted by thieves.
It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.
On nights with a full moon, Clefairy gather from all over and dance. Bathing in moonlight makes them float.
It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.
The moonlight that it stores in the wings on its back apparently gives it the ability to float in midair.
Adored for their cute looks and playfulness. They are thought to be rare, as they do not appear often.
